summary: Tested transfer image URL fix and PDF generation with multi-city support. All backend tests passed (12/12). Frontend UI tests passed - transfer detail modal shows image correctly, Download PDF button works.

issues: HTML hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> - React rendering issue in table structure (pre-existing, not blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: MyProposals.jsx has HTML hydration errors with <tr> inside <span> - should be fixed for cleaner React rendering
seed_data_creation: Used existing test proposal 1b5af497-d15c-4d3f-be65-3ebdbe45ed20 (Trip to Tbilisi with 3 cities)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Transfer image URL fix verified working. Images are stored as relative paths (/api/static/activities/...) and resolved correctly via resolveImageUrl() helper in App.js. PDF generation endpoint returns valid PDF with multi-city hotel support using cityName_cityIndex key format (Tbilisi_0, Gudauri_1, Tbilisi_2).

transfer_image_url_fix.DetailViewModal shows image: PASSED - green landscape photo displayed at top of modal

pdf_generation.GET /api/proposals/{id}/pdf returns vali: PASSED - HTTP 200, PDF magic bytes verified
pdf_generation.Multi-city hotels keyed correctly: PASSED - Tbilisi_0, Gudauri_1, Tbilisi_2 keys present
pdf_generation.Hotel names correct: PASSED - Horizont Hotel Tbilisi at Tbilisi_0

transfer_detail_modal.Modal shows route: PASSED - From Tbilisi International Airport (TBS) To Tbilisi center

mocked_apis_note: Google Sheets sync, PayPal checkout, Aviationstack flight API are MOCKED as per original spec
